talks.title: The Future of JavaScript
talks.description: An in-depth look at the upcoming features in JavaScript and how they will shape the future of web development.

talks.title: Building Scalable APIs with Node.js
talks.description: Learn how to design and build RESTful APIs that can handle millions of requests, using Node.js and Express.

talks.title: Introduction to Machine Learning
talks.description: A beginner-friendly introduction to the world of machine learning, covering the basic concepts and algorithms.

talks.title: Deploying Applications with Docker and Kubernetes
talks.description: This talk will guide you through the process of containerizing your applications with Docker and deploying them on a Kubernetes cluster.

talks.title: The State of Mobile Development
talks.description: An overview of the current trends in mobile development, comparing native and cross-platform solutions.

talks.title: Cybersecurity in 2026
talks.description: Learn about the latest threats in cybersecurity and how to protect your applications and infrastructure from attacks.
